title: inula britannica subsp. linariifolia
intro: Inula britannica subsp. linariifolia, also known as fleabane or golden samphire, is a subspecies of the Inula britannica plant, which is a flowering perennial plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Inula britannica subsp. linariifolia include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, including fever and skin problems.
